'''ân-sh-b''' ('''kanashab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quicksave|quicksave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quicksave|quicksave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-sh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kanashab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinashab|thinashab]] || [[word:jinashab|jinashab]] || [[word:shinashab|shinashab]] || [[word:kinashab|kinashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunashab|thuthunashab]] || [[word:jujunashab|jujunashab]] || [[word:shushunashab|shushunashab]] || [[word:kukunashab|kukunashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunashab|thunashab]] || [[word:junashab|junashab]] || [[word:shunashab|shunashab]] || [[word:kunashab|kunashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunashab|thunashab]] || [[word:junashab|junashab]] || [[word:shunashab|shunashab]] || [[word:kunashab|kunashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenashab|thenashab]] || [[word:jenashab|jenashab]] || [[word:shenashab|shenashab]] || [[word:kenashab|kenashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonashab|thothonashab]] || [[word:jojonashab|jojonashab]] || [[word:shoshonashab|shoshonashab]] || [[word:kokonashab|kokonashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonashab|thonashab]] || [[word:jonashab|jonashab]] || [[word:shonashab|shonashab]] || [[word:konashab|konashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonashab|thonashab]] || [[word:jonashab|jonashab]] || [[word:shonashab|shonashab]] || [[word:konashab|konashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnashab|thĂŠnashab]] || [[word:jĂŠnashab|jĂŠnashab]] || [[word:shĂŠnashab|shĂŠnashab]] || [[word:kĂŠnashab|kĂŠnashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanashab|thathanashab]] || [[word:jajanashab|jajanashab]] || [[word:shashanashab|shashanashab]] || [[word:kakanashab|kakanashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanashab|thanashab]] || [[word:janashab|janashab]] || [[word:shanashab|shanashab]] || [[word:kanashab|kanashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanashab|thanashab]] || [[word:janashab|janashab]] || [[word:shanashab|shanashab]] || [[word:kanashab|kanashab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanashab|shanashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanashab|goshanashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanashab|gokishanashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanashabnĂŒ|shanashabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanashabnknĂŒ|goshanashabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashabnĂŒ|gokishanashabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanashabshĂ«|shanashabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanashabnkshĂ«|goshanashabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanashabshĂ«|gokishanashabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashabro|shanashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashabnkro|goshanashabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashabro|gokishanashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashabmu|shanashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashabnkmu|goshanashabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashabmu|gokishanashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanashabsher|shanashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanashabnksher|goshanashabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanashabsher|gokishanashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanashabng|shanashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanashabnkng|goshanashabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanashabng|gokishanashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanashabya|shanashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanashabnkya|goshanashabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanashabya|gokishanashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanashabyam|shanashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanashabnkyam|goshanashabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanashabyam|gokishanashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashabnĂŒshĂ«|shanashabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanashabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanashabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashabnĂŒro|shanashabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashabnknĂŒro|goshanashabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashabnĂŒro|gokishanashabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashabnĂŒmu|shanashabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashabnknĂŒmu|goshanashabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashabnĂŒmu|gokishanashabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashabshĂ«nĂŒ|shanashabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanashabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanashabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashabshĂ«ro|shanashabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashabnkshĂ«ro|goshanashabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashabshĂ«ro|gokishanashabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashabshĂ«mu|shanashabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashabnkshĂ«mu|goshanashabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashabshĂ«mu|gokishanashabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashabronĂŒ|shanashabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashabnkronĂŒ|goshanashabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashabronĂŒ|gokishanashabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashabroshĂ«|shanashabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashabnkroshĂ«|goshanashabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashabroshĂ«|gokishanashabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashabromu|shanashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashabnkromu|goshanashabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashabromu|gokishanashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashabmunĂŒ|shanashabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashabnkmunĂŒ|goshanashabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashabmunĂŒ|gokishanashabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashabmushĂ«|shanashabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashabnkmushĂ«|goshanashabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashabmushĂ«|gokishanashabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashabmuro|shanashabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashabnkmuro|goshanashabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashabmuro|gokishanashabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
